---
name: Security vulnerability
about: Report a security issue (do not open a public issue)
title: "security: "
labels: "security"
assignees: ""
---

Please do **not** report security vulnerabilities via GitHub issues.

Instead, follow the instructions in [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md).

If you believe you have found a vulnerability, include:
- A description of the impact
- Steps to reproduce (if safe)
- Any relevant logs (redact secrets)
- A suggested fix or mitigation (if known)
